name: New Moon
themes: Quiet reset, clarifying motives, committing to internal alignment.
guidance: Lower output, listen to body, set one hypothesis rather than a dozen goals.

name: Waxing Crescent
themes: Take first micro-actions, share drafts, invite accountability.
guidance: Protect fragile ideas from overexposure while still moving forward.

name: First Quarter
themes: Hit resistance that demands refinement or firmer commitment.
guidance: Name the friction honestly; choose to course-correct or double down.

name: Waxing Gibbous
themes: Fine-tuning strategy, securing resources, aligning collaborators.
guidance: Audit systems and expectations; set the stage for visibility.

name: Full Moon
themes: Insight arrives; truths are revealed; emotional tides peak.
guidance: Share outcomes, celebrate learning, let go of what cannot travel forward.

name: Waning Gibbous
themes: Integrate, document, distribute wisdom gained during the build.
guidance: Create templates, mentor others, and metabolize feedback.

name: Last Quarter
themes: Discern what stays, what goes, and what needs closure.
guidance: Simplify obligations, resolve tension, and secure energetic boundaries.

name: Waning Crescent
themes: Deep recovery, dreamwork, preparing quietly for the next cycle.
guidance: Downshift commitments, focus on sleep and somatic repair.
